description: This is a set of white, low-poly park benches arranged in a circular pattern around a small, abstract central object. There are two long benches facing opposite each other, and two smaller, single-seater benches positioned between them. The benches have a slatted design for both the seat and the backrest, giving them a simple and clean aesthetic. The central object appears to be a stylized representation of a plant or abstract sculpture. The overall presentation suggests a modern, minimalist outdoor seating area, perhaps in a park, garden, or public square.
